description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in a solid black fabric. The sofa features two large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, all of which appear plush and comfortable. A single, matching black throw or blanket is draped over one side of the seat, adding a subtle accent. The armrests are straight, low, and squared, matching the overall geometric profile of the sofa. The legs are slim, straight, and black, positioned at the corners, giving the sofa a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A sleek, modern black two-seater sofa with straight armrests, plush loose cushions, and slim black legs. A matching throw is draped over one seat, and the upholstery is smooth and solid.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large back cushions, two seat cushions, straight armrests, and a black throw draped over the left seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's slim profile, straight armrest, and the thickness of the back and seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the uniform height of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other armrest and the consistent cushion arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, all uniform in size and shape, with a single throw draped over one seat.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, squared armrests at each end, low in height and matching the seat level, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, straight legs positioned at the corners, likely metal with a black finish, slightly elevating the sofa above the ground.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions forming a continuous, uniform surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
